# Test Plan: Self-Contained Claude Outputs

**Generated by:** test-generator agent dogfood
**Date:** 2026-06-16
**Target:** `packages/adapters/claude-code/src/index.ts`

---

## Behaviours Under Test

| # | Behaviour | Covers (Story/FR) | Risk if broken |
|---|-----------|-------------------|----------------|
| 1 | Claude adapter emits support files for referenced policies. | Story 1, FR-001 | High |
| 2 | Claude adapter emits support files for referenced output templates. | Story 1, FR-002 | High |
| 3 | Generated agent content points at `.claude/sdlc/...` support paths. | FR-003 | High |
| 4 | Support files include generated ownership marker and canonical source path. | Story 3, FR-007 | Medium |
| 5 | Build manifest includes support files through existing `runBuild()` path. | Story 2, FR-005 | Medium |
| 6 | Non-Claude adapters remain unchanged. | FR-008 | Medium |

## Test Matrix

| Test name | Input | Expected | Category |
|-----------|-------|----------|----------|
| renders policy support files for referenced policies | Agent with `policies: ["conventions"]` and context policy map | Output includes `.claude/sdlc/policies/conventions.md` | happy |
| renders template support files for referenced output template | Agent with `output_template: templates/plan.md` and context template map | Output includes `.claude/sdlc/templates/plan.md` | happy |
| rewrites agent references to generated support paths | Agent with policy + output template | Agent content references `.claude/sdlc/...`, not root paths | happy |
| skips unreferenced support files | Context contains extra policy/template not used by agents | No unreferenced support output | edge |
| fails earlier validation for missing canonical support source | Agent references missing policy/template | Existing project validation reports error before render | error |
| includes support files in manifest | Run build fixture | `.sdlc/build-manifest.json` contains support paths | integration |

## Coverage Decisions

- Covered deeply: Claude adapter path/content behaviour, reference rewrites, deterministic support file markers.
- Covered lightly: manifest inclusion, because existing build tests already cover generic output manifest behavior.
- Not covered: real Claude Code runtime invocation; this requires a manual pilot in Claude Code after generated files exist.

## Coverage Gaps

- No automated test can prove Claude Code UI discovers the generated support files from within a subagent prompt.
- No installer-copy test exists yet because there is no installer.

---

## Handoff -> code-reviewer

**Next agent:** code-reviewer
**Inputs to provide:** this test plan plus implementation diff
**Notes for reviewer:** focus on whether generated files are truly copyable and whether the adapter remains deterministic.
